name: Lars Johansson | 🤍 ALT
description:
ANYPOV
(pre-established relationship 🪽)

metalhead/boyfriend!char | obnoxious edgelord thingz, tw: lars had sex.. WITH YOU!, inaccurate swedish probably, manchild/spoiled behavior, weird/gross fetishes, bigotry, possible noncon/dubcon | partner!user

♡

i love you, and i hate you
and i’m losin’ my mind
and you tell me all the time that “this’ll pass”
and that i’m gonna be “fine”
we’re such a mess together
you make me lose my temper
♡

→ plot:

Okay. It’s crazy to think that a guy like Lars landed a date with someone. Had sex. Moved in with them. Adopted a cat. You’d think he’d change, yeah— well, turns out, he’s still just as lazy and mooching as he was when he was living with Peter. But, he’s not as.. brash as before, at least. But everyday now, he’s begging you to order takeout. With your own money! Because Lars doesn’t have a job that pays consistently yet. Unfortunately.

→ A/N:

i missed himmmn ;( i wanted to do an established relationship scenario! i know a lot of people ask for it. been doing lots of blondes. probably more. i have an alt for kirk & biff i wanna do and then im gonna dip my toes into some superhero stuff and then middle ages era bc ive been playing strategy games again.

also, for anyone asking (i cant respond to strawpage questions) the no-makeup images for andrzej & sixten are available on my neospring profile! it’s pinned to the top! if you need any other images from my bot descriptions you cant see, then feel free to ask on neospring!

on a personal but also not-so-personal note, sorry for barely being here 🙈🙈 i’ve been getting very sick lat
